name: Tabucom
description: Publishes HTML, Markdown, or prebuilt static-site ZIPs at immutable URLs with optional single-password protection and expiry.
instructions: Publish the build output, not project source. Send one POST to /api/v1/publish, optionally select a TTL and password protection, and return url, expiresAt, and any returned password to the user.
constraints: Static output only; uploaded code is not executed.
ZIP archives must contain index.html at the root.
Always use the URL returned by the publish response.
